evals.prompt: I need to build an analytics dashboard with KPI cards at the top, a main chart area, and a recent activity list on the side.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend Pattern 1 (Dashboard KPI) as primary + Pattern 4 (Split Content) for chart + sidebar. Should specify KPI grid: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)), split: 3fr 2fr. Should use existing Card, Table, Badge components from @repo/ui. Should NOT suggest native HTML elements. Should mention all pages render inside AppLayout (left nav + header already present).

evals.prompt: Build a settings page with a sidebar navigation and multiple sections.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend Pattern 8 (Sidebar + Content). Should mention existing SidebarNav component at layouts/sidebar-nav.tsx. Should specify split: 240px minmax(0, 1fr). Should use existing @repo/ui components (Tabs, Card, Separator, Input, Button). Should note the page renders inside AppLayout so outer sidebar/header already exists.
